projects.title: Xiaozhi AI on ESP32 DevKit V1
projects.description: Run a real-time AI voice assistant on the ESP32 DevKit V1 using Xiaozhi firmware. Includes INMP441 microphone, MAX98357A I2S amplifier, full wiring guide and firmware.
projects.overview: Run a real-time AI voice assistant on the ESP32 DevKit V1 using Xiaozhi firmware. This project walks you through wiring an INMP441 MEMS microphone and MAX98357A I2S amplifier to get a fully working voice AI on a $5 microcontroller.
steps: Wire INMP441 microphone to ESP32 — VDD to 3.3V, GND to GND, SD to GPIO34, WS to GPIO15, SCK to GPIO14
Wire MAX98357A amplifier — VIN to 5V, GND to GND, DIN to GPIO22, BCLK to GPIO26, LRC to GPIO25
Connect speaker to MAX98357A output pins
Download Xiaozhi firmware from the project page
Flash firmware via Arduino IDE at 921600 baud — select ESP32 Dev Module
Power on and wait for WiFi setup — connect to Xiaozhi AP and configure your network
Say the wake word and start talking to your AI assistant!

about.description: Step-by-step hardware and firmware projects for makers.
